name: Mary Bergin's Macadamia Nut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup roasted macadamia nuts, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter and granulated sugar on medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the honey, egg yolk, and vanilla extract.
3. Stir in the flour and chopped macadamia nuts. Form the dough into a log about 12 inches long and 1 1/2 inches wide.
4. Wrap the dough tightly in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours or until firm.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
7. Slice the chilled dough into 1/4-inch thick slices using a sharp knife.
8. Place the cookie slices about 1 inch apart on the prepared cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the cookies feel firm to the touch and have golden edges.
10. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring them to a cooling rack.
11. Store the cooled cookies in an airtight container.
